channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Mounting Mysteries at Mount Charuk
item.description:
In the aftermath of the battle, the crew finds their way to old friends—and discover new foes.

Duration: 2:28:52

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Eyeless Crisis at Katur
item.description:
Deep under the sea, a battle commences, and the crew fights to keep an eldritch threat at bay.

Duration: 2:29:15

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: An Odious Occurrence in Oda
item.description:
The crew explores the bright festivities in Oda, but something sinister is lurking in the shadows.

Duration: 2:12:41

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
